title: Galați、Galați — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Galați、Galațiの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

GalațiはGalațiにある人口249,432の都市です。A major port city on the Danube River, known for its shipbuilding industry, steel works, and the nearby natural beauty of the Danube Delta.
